qas.a: provides individuals with mission essential training needed to meet the requirements of an assignment to short or long tour locations

qas.q: En-Route training for long tour location
qas.a: only authorized for tour lengths less than 3 years or if specific courses are not available at that location
will receive priority status over long tour assignments

qas.q: through the MTS, to the parent MAJCOM
qas.a: Each year gaining units must submit the annual screening process an AF Form 3933, MAJCOM Mission Training Request, through who to meet future en-route requirements
at the beginning of the assignment cycle
Training requests initiated within 90 days of MPF return no later than date (RNLTD)
Who will the gaining MTS notify when it is determined that an En-Route training requirement no longer exists
Who should receive training on the new system/weapons system prior to assuming their duties at the gaining location
Personnel reporting to an OCONUS tour with a tour length of less than 3 years

qas.q: Will receive this training at the gaining duty location
qas.a: Personnel reporting to an OCONUS long tour (tour lengths 3 years or more) or CONUS tour

qas.q: Personnel should receive training en-route prior to arrival
qas.a: In cases where the training is not available at the gaining long tour or CONUS location
Can choose to exercise reach-back for training requests to Lead MAJCOMs
